title: vernonia calvoana subsp. ulugurensis
intro: Vernonia calvoana subsp. ulugurensis is a plant species that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly known as the ironweed. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating wounds, inflammation, and infections, due to its high content of flavonoids and terpenoids. The health benefits of Vernonia calvoana subsp. ulugurensis include reducing fever, relieving pain, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine to treat various ailments.
